name: second-brain
description: All brain2 vault interactions in one plugin. LLM-maintained knowledge wiki for your Obsidian vault. Skills: second-brain (mega: ingest/query/lint/note/brain-dump/kanban), memory-recall (read-only wiki/code-knowledge/), project-memory-recall (role-partitioned per-project query), project-memory-dream (daily 2 AM coordinator that dispatches PO/DEV/QC/CMO sub-agents per project to digest observation logs into memory). Observation-driven pipeline: every Claude turn auto-logged to workspace `observation.md` by Stop hook (auto-creates + self-registers in ~/.claude/observation-workspaces.json); nightly dream digests per workspace, archives day's log. 3 hooks: SessionStart inject, UserPromptSubmit reminder, Stop observation_logger. Vault path via SECOND_BRAIN_VAULT.
